discrepancies.recommendation: Verify whether NB02b (H2 hypothesis verdict via hypergeometric enrichment test) was always intended as a separate notebook or was split post-hoc. If split post-hoc, determine whether this constitutes a material analytical change or merely a code-organization decision.

Then run `hmmsearch` (HMMER 3)...
discrepancies.execution_citation: Notebook notebooks/06b_ncbi_annotation_presence.ipynb exists as a separate, distinct notebook (imports: Bio, numpy, pandas, pathlib, time). Plan prescribes NB06 as a single notebook with conditional NCBI fallback; execution splits NCBI arm into a separate NB06b.

If split into separate NB06b, confirm the split was driven by BERDL coverage insufficiency (as the plan stipulates) or was a post-hoc code organization choice.

discrepancies.plan_quote: Expected Outcomes table: **H1 ChvI engagement** — Threshold for 'supported': 'Hypergeometric p<1e-5 for ChvI-induced ∩ up-DEG in either contrast (Stein OR QY set).'
discrepancies.execution_citation: Statistical Tests Detected in methods_provenance: 'Fisher's exact test' in notebooks/03_chvi_phase_partition_sigU.ipynb (cell 10, line 19) — kw: alternative='greater'
discrepancies.recommendation: Fisher's exact test and hypergeometric test are related but distinct; Fisher's exact is for 2×2 contingency tables, while hypergeometric tests set-membership enrichment over a finite universe. Verify whether Fisher's exact was intentionally substituted for hypergeometric, or if both tests were computed. If substituted, confirm that the p-value threshold and interpretation remain valid under the alternative test.

discrepancies.plan_quote: Stop condition: '**NB01 disagreement**: less than 30% Spearman concordance between Leaden Δfur logFC and our 4584-vs-4580 logFC (over genes with |logFC|>1 in either set). Would indicate Δ*sspB* dominates the signal, requiring reframe of H2...'  **NB02 preflight failure**: 'fewer than 3 envelope-stress AND fewer than 3 iron-limitation experiments in Caulo fitness data — H2 drops to exploratory status...' **NB02 null result**: 'fewer than 10% of Fur-released genes (from NB01 or 4584-vs-4580) reach the H2 phenotype-bearing threshold...' **NB04 contradiction**: 'sphingolipid biosynthesis pathway (any of *spt*, *bcerS*, *acp*, *cerR*, *acps*) significantly induced (logFC>1, FDR<0.05) in 4584-vs-4580 OR 4599-vs-4584.'
discrepancies.execution_citation: Methods provenance shows coded stop-condition variables (e.g., 'VERDICT = ... if rho_s >= 0.3 else ...' in NB01 cell 5; 'PREFLIGHT_PASS = n_env >= 3 and n_iron >= 3' in NB02 cell 5), but does not document the evaluated results of these conditions or any plan revisions triggered by them.
discrepancies.recommendation: Extract the evaluated results of all four pre-registered stop conditions from notebook outputs (NB01, NB02, NB04). Document whether any stop condition triggered a plan revision. If no revision was triggered, document the quantitative results (e.g., actual Spearman rho from NB01, actual % phenotype-bearing from NB02, actual biosynthesis logFC from NB04) to confirm the conditions were met. This is critical for pre-registration integrity.

discrepancies.recommendation: Verify that NB05 cell 2 or 3 (before DE analysis) explicitly constructs and saves `data/NB05_pg_gene_set.csv`. Confirm that the saved set is identical to the one used in subsequent DE comparisons. This safeguard prevents post-hoc gene selection bias in hypothesis H4.
